programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue
programme.desc: Cleaning expert Hayley Leitch and her team of professional cleaners answer SOS calls from Britain's filthiest houses while identifying unhealthy habits which cause mess.

programme.title: Bake Off: The Professionals S3
programme.desc: Twelve teams from top hotels, restaurants and small businesses compete to be crowned best patisserie team in Britain. Once again, judges Cherish Finden and Benoit Blin set exceedingly tricky challenges, to test the teams' creativity and precision. From towering, skyline-inspired chocolate constructions, to geometric tarts with moving parts, these incredible creations showcase bakers at the peak of their profession.

programme.title: Nomad with Carlton McCoy
programme.desc: Over a glorious summer of hard work and fantastic food, the series presents a sun-soaked escape to the country along with delicious, inspiring recipes you can try in From the towns of the Mississippi Delta to the bustling alleys of South Korea via diaspora communities, flourishing African townships and volcanic islands, world-class chef, master sommelier and arbiter of cool Carlton McCoy presents a new six-part series exploring the world like never before.

programme.title: Survivor 47
programme.desc: 18 new castaways battle it out on the islands of Fiji for a million dollars and the title of Sole Survivor.

programme.title: Supa Strikas S7
programme.desc: Follow Shakes, Rasta and the rest of the Supa Strikas on their quest to become the world's greatest football team!

programme.title: Slugterra S1
programme.desc: Slugterra is an epic sci-fi comedy adventure set deep underground, where the ammo's alive and only the quick survive! In this luminous, high-tech, underground world every cavern holds a new adventure, new battle and weird little slugs to be discovered!

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S27
programme.desc: Thomas the Number One Engine and his loc-amigos are ready for more Sodor surprises! The engines are celebrating the grand opening of a new bakery-caf connecting farm-to-table routes and keeping busy bringing ingredients and sweet-smelling, flatcar-filling treats to festive tables. Thomas, Percy, Kana, Nia, Bruno and Diesel take on every challenge coupling with new and returning friends to get each job done.

programme.title: Pinkfong Sing-Along Movie 3: Catch the Gingerbread Man
programme.desc: Join Baby Shark, Pinkfong, and Hogi in their exciting new adventure as they set out to create the most delicious ice cream in the world! Just before the final touch, the perfect topping, Gingerbread Man dashes away. Will they be able to catch him and complete their ice cream masterpiece? Get ready for an exciting musical adventure and sing and dance to Pinkfong's most-beloved songs!

programme.title: Andy's Global Adventures
programme.desc: In his latest set of adventures, Andy travels to all corners of the globe, meeting an amazing new cast of animals - from chameleons in Sri Lanka to emperor penguins in Antarctica. Accompanied by tech wizard Jen and new information-seeking AI Scout, Andy travels the globe in a hi-tech expedition truck, a scientific research station that houses Jen's database of incredible facts about fauna and flora that inhabit our planet.

programme.title: Blippi Delivers The Mail

programme.title: LEGO Monkie Kid: A Hero Is Born

programme.title: Out of the Nest
programme.desc: Follow the story of Arthur, a young, ambitious goat who teams up with seven chicks to embark on a grand mission to defeat the dark power of an evil wizard and restore the kingdom.

programme.title: Pokemon Ultimate Journeys: The Series
programme.desc: The stakes are higher than ever for Ash, Goh, and Chloe as they advance toward their goals! As the Pokmon World Coronation Series tournament heats up, intensive training is in store for Ash, Pikachu, and their Pokmon friends.

programme.title: On The Red Dot
programme.desc: On The Red Dot offers weekly in-depth analysis and discussion on key issues and events that matter to Singaporeans.

programme.title: Talking Point
programme.desc: Singapore saw a 27 increase in traffic accidents in recent years. We investigate if such accidents are caused by a lack of driving skills or bad attitudes on our roads.

programme.title: Lion Mums S3
programme.desc: Chae Lian's exhaustion reaches tipping point, and her three children must band together to support her. Will the misunderstanding between mother and son be finally dissolved? Marcus attempts to right the wrongs of his company, going against his business partners to ensure justice. Marcus' decision to right the wrongs and fight for justice leaves him with a lot to lose, but will he hold on to the virtue of having done the right thing?

Two styles, two cravingsone delicious showdown!

At the same time, Winston's impending departure from Hua Seng Secondary causes some tension between him and Spencer. Will he eventually desert Spencer for friends at Anson High?

programme.title: Incredible Tales S8
programme.desc: It is true that home is a place where happiness is created and it can give warmth to the people living in it. However, what if, you aren't the only ones staying in this home? When the new occupants find out that they have to live with an extra guest, what would they do?

programme.title: The Ark S1
programme.desc: Follows the remaining crew of a spacecraft known as Ark One, who must become the best versions of themselves to stay on course and survive after experiencing a catastrophic event that caused massive destruction and loss of life.

programme.title: Lingo UK S1

programme.title: World's Wildest Weather: Caught On Camera
programme.desc: A funny and frightening rollercoaster journey investigating our planet's most extreme weather as told and filmed by ordinary people caught in the eye of the storm'. We follow the incredible human stories of the families caught up in snowstorms, avalanches, floods, landslides, terrifying wildfires and too close for comfort lightning strikes. The film uses jaw dropping, often never-before-seen footage, captured on cameras and phones.

programme.title: Beat the Chasers S6
programme.desc: Could you beat the greatest quiz team ever assembled? Bringing together all five of our favourite quiz geniuses, Beat the Chasers, hosted by Bradley Walsh, expands the award-winning The Chase brand for a primetime audience.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal Australia S12
programme.desc: The exhilarating hit game show where contestants must beat The Banker to win a huge cash prize, is making a triumphant return. The ultimate contest of nerve, luck and pure gut instinct will be fronted by one of Australia's most beloved TV presenters, Gold Logie winner Grant Denyer.

programme.title: Mat Yoyo: The New Generation
programme.desc: Kim, Yoyo and Yaya explore the world of fruits and find out the health benefits of different coloured fruits. Why segment - Why can't we just have cookies for dinner? Kim explains to Yoyo and Yaya why eating cookies alone isn't good for them. They are introduced to the food pyramid which shows them the different food groups and what makes a balanced diet.

programme.title: Club M.A.G.I.C S2
programme.desc: One step forward, one step back! It's time to dance on Club M.A.G.I.C! Miss P finds the agents demonstrating different types of dance and even Sham asks Miss P to dance the waltz with him! Miss P decides to send the agents on a mission to find out more about things to do with dance and dancing! THE BIG WORD is 'flamenco' and the smaller words are fan, calm and name.

programme.title: The Big Q S1
programme.desc: If you've ever screwed in a simple screw then you're half way to understanding how the MRT is built - this week we take you tunneling to find out the full answer to the question. Next we look at the mysteries of the weather and show you how to build your own mini weather station. Finally - if you've ever felt sick in the car, join us as we investigate why we sometimes feel queasy when we're on the move.

programme.title: Zoo TV
programme.desc: The serious showcases Singapore Zoo and it's animals, with each episode focusing on a specific genre ie: predators. The series looks at the different species of predators in the zoo, shares interesting information about specific animals and highlights endangered species.

programme.title: 星 料理

programme.title: 叶问 2
programme.desc: After defending himself against the Japanese army in the first film, Ip Man goes with his family to start anew in Hong Kong. However, Ip finds out the hard way that the Hong Kong martial arts world is controlled by a group of martial arts masters, led by the powerful Master Hung. To survive in Hong Kong, Ip not only needs to gain acceptance from the masters, but also from the corrupted British-run police force and an arrogant British boxer. 1949年叶问甄子丹饰带同妻儿前往香港建立新的家园幸得到在报馆当主编的梁根敖嘉年饰借出天台予.

programme.title: 灵探

programme.title: 灵探
